subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned towards Him! Hearken unto the Call of thy Lord, the All-Glorious, from this hallowed and blessed crimson Spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المقبل ان استمع ندآء ربک الابهی علی البقعه المقدسه المبارکه الحمرا من
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
